title: Pochi

{{Quote|He ''[Faarl]'' is seldom actually on the battlefield, preferring to direct his pirates from a hidden base somewhere in the Parthovian Cluster.|Airen Cracken, ''Wanted by Cracken''|<ref name="WbC" />}}
'''Pochi''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located in the [[Faarlsun system/Legends|Faarlsun system]], a part of [[Wild Space/Legends|Wild Space's]] [[Parthovian Cluster/Legends|Parthovian Cluster]]. It was an arid yet habitable world, the surface of which featured endless plains, covered in low [[Grass/Legends|grasses]] and small [[Tree/Legends|trees]], and low [[Mountain/Legends|mountain]] ranges.

Pochi was the [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of the [[Tulvaree]]s, [[Sentience/Legends|semi-intelligent]], tribe-based [[Bird/Legends|avians]] that practiced [[Hunting/Legends|hunting]]. At some point, a massive tower known as [[Fortress Baarlos]] was constructed on Pochi by a group whose identity was later forgotten.

Ten [[Millennium/Legends|millennia]] later, the [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] and warlord [[Faarl]] established [[Gender/Legends|his]] base of operations on Pochi, running his [[Faarl's empire|empire]] from Fortress Baarlos. Faarl employed the Tulvarees as [[Soldier/Legends|soldiers]], but eventually the [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] [[Assault on Fortress Baarlos|assaulted]] Faarl's [[Fortress/Legends|fortress]] and claimed the [[Bounty/Legends|bounty]] posted on the warlord.

==Description==
Pochi was a terrestrial [[Planet/Legends|planet]] with three [[Moon/Legends|moons]] that was located in the [[Faarlsun system/Legends|Faarlsun system]],<ref name="CSWE Pochi" /> a part of the [[Parthovian Cluster/Legends|Parthovian Cluster]]<ref name="WbC" /> in [[Wild Space/Legends|Wild Space]].<ref name="EAOC" /> The planet occupied the fourth [[Orbit/Legends|orbit]] around its [[Star/Legends|star]], the [[Color/Legends|yellow-white]] [[Faarlsun]], and circled it once every 350 [[Local day/Legends|local days]], which lasted 25 [[Standard hour/Legends|standard hours]] each.<ref name="WbC" />

Pochi had standard [[Gravity/Legends|gravity]] and a breathable [[Atmosphere/Legends|Type I]] atmosphere.<ref name="WbC" /> Pochi was an arid yet habitable world.<ref name="CSWE Pochi" /> The seasonal variation of the planet's climate was minimal except in the vicinity of the poles, which led to an almost constantly [[Temperature/Legends|temperate]]-to-warm temperatures. More [[Water/Legends|moisture]] was available near the planet's coastlines.<ref name="WbC" />

Pochi's surface featured endless<ref name="CSWE Pochi" /> dry<ref name="WbC" /> plains, low [[Mountain/Legends|mountain]] ranges,<ref name="CSWE Pochi" /> and [[Cave/Legends|caves]]. There were also coastlines on the planet, along which small [[Forest/Legends|forests]] were situated. The [[Plant/Legends|flora]] of Pochi's plains consisted of low scrub [[Grass/Legends|grasses]] and groves of small [[Tree/Legends|trees]]. The planet's mountains were home to [[Diet/Legends|grazing]] herbivores.<ref name="WbC" />

==History==
At some point, [[Fortress Baarlos]] was constructed on Pochi. An estimated ten [[Millennium/Legends|millennia]] later,<ref name="CSWE Fortress" /> the [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] and conqueror<ref name="WbC" /> [[Faarl]] established control over Pochi,<ref name="CSWE tulvarees" /> with the base of operations<ref name="CSWE Fortress" /> for [[Faarl's empire|his empire]]<ref name="WbC" /> located at the [[Fortress/Legends|fortress]].<ref name="CSWE Fortress" /> Recognizing the potential of the native [[Tulvaree]]s as [[Soldier/Legends|soldiers]], Faarl provided the [[Bird/Legends|avians]] with a constant supply of [[Foodstuff/Legends|food]],<ref name="CSWE tulvarees" /> medicines, and other commodities<ref name="WbC" /> in exchange for their allegiance, and soon they learned to follow the Human's orders<ref name="CSWE tulvarees" /> and to use weapons.<ref name="WbC" />

In [[7 ABY/Legends|7 ABY]],<ref name="Date">[[Wanted by Cracken (sourcebook)|''Wanted by Cracken'']] is dated to three [[Standard year/Legends|years]] after the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]]. Since ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' dates that conflict to [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]], the placement of the sourcebook therefore translates to [[7 ABY/Legends|7 ABY]].</ref> in an entry of the [[Datafile/Legends|datafile]] ''[[Wanted by Cracken]]'' dedicated to Faarl, the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[General/Legends|General]] [[Airen Cracken/Legends|Airen Cracken]] noted that the pirate leader led [[Gender/Legends|his]] operations from a hidden base in the Parthovian Cluster.<ref name="WbC" /> Eventually,<ref name="CSWE Fortress" /> the [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]]<ref name="CSWE Boba Fett">{{CSWECite|I|266|Fett, Boba}}</ref> [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] [[Assault on Fortress Baarlos|assaulted]] Fortress Baarlos, catching Faarl unprepared in the process.<ref name="CSWE Fortress" /> Fett used a [[Wing-Blast rocket pack]] to attack the Tulvaree guardians of the fortress and collected the [[Bounty/Legends|bounty]] that had been posted on Faarl.<ref name="Insider80">{{InsiderCite|80|The History of the Mandalorians: Exploring the Evolution of a Mighty Race of Warriors}}</ref>

==Inhabitants==
[[File:Tulvaree.jpg|thumb|left|210px|The Tulvarees were native to Pochi.]]
Pochi was a primitive world.<ref name="WbC" /> It was [[Homeworld/Legends|home]] to the Tulvarees, a [[Species/Legends|species]] of [[Sentience/Legends|semi-intelligent]] avians that [[Hunting/Legends|hunted]]<ref name="CSWE tulvarees" /> the planet's mountain herbivores. The Tulvarees could understand [[Language/Legends|language]] but did not use tools or create works of art. They also did not build structures, instead living in caves or other natural shelters. The Tulvarees lived in large tribes composed of extended families and constantly practiced inter-tribal warfare.<ref name="WbC" />

Pochi was at one point inhabited by a group that built Fortress Baarlos on the planet. Over [[Time/Legends|time]], however, the knowledge of the identity of those builders had been lost,<ref name="CSWE Fortress" /> but it was thought they had been [[Warlord/Legends|warlords]].<ref name="WbC" />

Eventually, the [[Human/Legends|Human]]<ref name="CSWE tulvarees" /> warlord<ref name="WbC" /> Faarl took control over Pochi<ref name="CSWE tulvarees" /> and established his base of operations in the fortress,<ref name="CSWE Fortress" /> employing Tulvarees as soldiers in exchange for a supply of food.<ref name="CSWE tulvarees" /> Other Humans also inhabited Pochi by that time, bringing the population of the planet to a total of six million beings.<ref name="WbC" />

==Locations==
[[File:Faarl.jpg|thumb|right|200px|The warlord Faarl used Pochi as his base of operations.]]
Pochi was the site of Fortress Baarlos, a massive<ref name="CSWE Fortress" /> tower-like<ref name="WbC" /> citadel that had withstood the effects of time and environment, possibly for as long as ten thousand [[Standard year/Legends|years]].<ref name="CSWE Fortress" /> The [[hatching caves]] of the Tulvaree were located far away from the tower yet were still visible from it.<ref name="WbC" />

Faarl had the fortress modified for use as his base of operations.<ref name="CSWE Fortress" /> The bedrock upon which the tower had been constructed also underwent extensive modification, with [[plasma driller]]s being utilized to excavate caverns. The latter housed dungeon cells, [[Power generator/Legends|power generators]], living quarters, and even [[Hangar/Legends|docking bays]] for Faarl's fleet of aircraft and smaller [[Starship/Legends|starships]]. The generators powered [[Planetary shield/Legends|planetary shields]], and all of the defenses of Pochi were controlled from within the mid-section of the tower.<ref name="WbC" />

The [[City/Legends|city]] of [[Vindru]] was also located on Pochi, and so was a [[Spaceport/Legends|spaceport]] offering limited services. Pochi had no major exports to offer to the wider [[galactic community]], and low-level technology, raw materials, and luxury items were all imported from off-world.<ref name="WbC" />

==Behind the scenes==
Pochi was mentioned in the [[1993]] sourcebook [[Wanted by Cracken (sourcebook)|''Wanted by Cracken'']], written by [[Louis J. Prosperi]] for [[West End Games]]' ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]''. In one instance, the book describes the climate of Pochi as humid, which contradicts several cases—both in ''Wanted by Cracken''<ref name="WbC" /> and the [[2008]] reference book ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''<ref name="CSWE Pochi" />—where the world is characterized as dry instead. This article assumes the former description is in error.<ref name="WbC" /> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Faarlsun [[Star system/Legends|system]], and therefore Pochi, in grid square T-4.<ref name="TEA">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref>
